nodes.name: foreign_data.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for foreign data wrapper (FDW) objects, testing CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER, SERVER, USER MAPPING, and FOREIGN TABLE.

nodes.name: foreign_key.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL for foreign key constraints, testing referential integrity enforcement, cascades, and deferred constraint checking.

nodes.name: functional_deps.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for functional dependency detection in GROUP BY clauses, testing optimizer's ability to infer column dependencies.

nodes.name: generated.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for generated columns (ALWAYS AS expressions), testing computed column storage and constraint enforcement.

nodes.name: geometry.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for geometric types (point, line, lseg, polygon), testing geometric operators and functions.

nodes.name: gin.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for GIN (Generalized Inverted Index) creation and query usage for array, JSONB, and full-text search.

nodes.name: gist.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for GiST (Generalized Search Tree) index creation and spatial query usage.

nodes.name: groupingsets.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for GROUPING SETS, CUBE, and ROLLUP multi-dimensional aggregation, testing result correctness.

nodes.name: guc.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for GUC (Grand Unified Configuration) parameter handling, testing SET, SHOW, and RESET for various server parameters.

nodes.name: hash_func.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hash functions used by the hash index and hash join, verifying deterministic hash output for various data types.

nodes.name: hash_index.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hash index creation and equality-based query usage.

nodes.name: hash_part.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hash partitioning, testing PARTITION BY HASH table creation, partition pruning, and routing.

nodes.name: horology.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL for date/time type operations, testing timestamps, intervals, time zones, and temporal arithmetic.

nodes.name: hs_primary_extremes.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby primary node extreme value scenarios, testing behavior under high transaction volume.

nodes.name: hs_primary_setup.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby primary node setup, creating test tables and data for standby query tests.

nodes.name: hs_standby_allowed.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby allowed read queries, testing which queries are permitted on a standby node.

nodes.name: hs_standby_check.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby data verification, checking that standby data matches primary state.

nodes.name: hs_standby_disallowed.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby disallowed operations, testing that write and DDL statements are rejected on standby.

nodes.name: hs_standby_functions.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for hot standby system functions, testing pg_is_in_recovery() and related standby introspection functions.

nodes.name: identity.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for IDENTITY columns (GENERATED ALWAYS/BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY), testing sequence-backed auto-increment columns.
